detail.description:
It's here! My dopamine…

The dungeon gates are open again! A new dungeon journey begins with Ribbon; this time, let's go all the way!

300 pulls, 8,000 Blue Gems, the Korea-exclusive 'Cheerleader' costume, and 28 Witch weapons are all given away for free!

▶ Awaken again with REBORN

[Warrior, Hunter, Priest, Mage, Rogue], freely choose from five classes, each with a different concept and unique abilities!

Raise the ultimate hero using various育成 systems tailored to your own play style!
